---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, skill, hook, CI check, or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

<What pain point or limitation are you running into? Describe the situation, not the solution.>

## What you'd like to happen

<Describe the feature or behaviour you'd like. Be specific about the user-visible outcome.>

## Why this matters

<Who benefits, and how? Is this a common pain or a niche need?>

## Alternatives considered

<What other approaches did you think about? Why are they less ideal?>

## Type of change (check one)

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New hook example
- [ ] New CI check template
- [ ] New MCP server (post-v1)
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill / hook / template
- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Configuration-schema addition

## Acceptance criteria

<How will we know this feature is complete? Observable outcomes, not implementation details.>

## Additional context

<Related issues, prior discussion, mockups, etc.>
